description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:edge Docker image and sets up a ccache directory in before_script (mkdir -p _ccache, export CCACHE_BASEDIR=${PWD}, export CCACHE_DIR=${PWD}/_ccache). Define a single build stage with a build-main job that runs apk add --update cmake make musl-dev gcc, then creates a build directory, runs cmake .. -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr, then make, make install, and make dist. The job caches the _ccache/ directory and stores the resulting build/vala-cmake-modules*.tar.xz file as an artifact that expires in one week. No additional triggers or deployment targets are defined.
